summary: Iteration 69 - UX Social Híbrida para Hispaloshop PASSED. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: HomePage with 3 info buttons, Featured Products, Feed, Best Sellers all render correctly. About page with 6 feature cards and 'Como funciona' section works. Navigation from info buttons works. Social event tracking accepts valid events and handles invalid events gracefully.
passed_tests: GET /api/feed - PASS (200, returns scored posts with has_more)
UI: HomePage 3 Info Buttons section - PASS
UI: Social Feed section with Trending - PASS
UI: About page 6 feature cards (0-5) - PASS
UI: Info button navigation to /about - PASS
UI: Info button navigation to /become-seller - PASS
UI: Info button navigation to /become-influencer - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Feed scoring algorithm correctly implemented: score = (product_sales*3) + (comments*2) + (likes*1) + boosts
Social event tracking stores events in social_events collection with proper validation
Best sellers aggregates from orders collection with correct pipeline
About page uses static features array with 6 items (indices 0-5) matching data-testid
HomePage order: Hero → 3 Info Buttons → Featured Products → Feed → Best Sellers
All data-testid attributes properly added for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 69 verified new UX Social Híbrida features: 1) HomePage restructured with Hero → 3 Info Buttons (btn-what-is, btn-become-seller, btn-become-influencer) → Featured Products → Social Feed → Best Sellers. 2) New AboutPage at /about with 6 feature cards (about-feature-0 through 5). 3) Feed scoring algorithm prioritizes: product_sales*3, comments*2, likes*1, +5 for tagged products, +3 for followed users, +4/<24h recency, +2/<72h. 4) GET /feed/best-sellers aggregates from orders. 5) POST /track/social-event accepts click_info, click_become_seller, click_become_influencer, view_post, etc.
mocked_api_notes: No mocked APIs - all endpoints tested against real backend
